chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُشْرِكُ قَرَابَتَهُ وَ إِخْوَتَهُ فِي حَجَّتِهِ أَوْ يَصِلُهُمْ بِحَجَّةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The one who participates his relatives and his brethren in his Hajj, or he links them with Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/233)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/233)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَوْ أَشْرَكْتَ أَلْفاً فِي حَجَّتِكَ لَكَانَ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ حَجَّةٌ مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ تَنْقُصَ حَجَّتُكَ شَيْئاً .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Abdullah, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Abu Imran Al Armany, from Ali Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If you were to participate a thousand in your Hajj, there would be a Hajj for each one, from without there being a reduction of anything in your Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ahmad ibn ‘Abd Allah has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from abu ‘Imran al-Armaniy from Ali ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’Even if you share your al-Hajj with a thousand people, still there will be one al-Hajj for every one without any reduction in your al-Hajj.’”
